title: aria nivea var. undulata
intro: Aria nivea var. undulata, also known as White Chrysanthemum or Undulating White Chrysanthemum, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of Aria nivea var. undulata include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to protect against cardiovascular disease and certain types of cancer. Aria nivea var. undulata is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties.
